member.name: M:HwHash.HwHash.Start
member.summary: Initializes HWHash and starts polling.

member.name: M:HwHash.HwHash.Stop
member.summary: Stops the polling loop.

member.name: M:HwHash.HwHash.GetHWHashStats
member.summary: Returns collection statistics (includes elapsed milliseconds and raw ticks).

member.name: M:HwHash.HwHash.GetJsonString(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns JSON-serialized sensor data. If order==true, returns sensors in display order.

member.name: M:HwHash.HwHash.GetJsonStringMini(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns JSON-serialized minified sensor data. If order==true, returns sensors in display order.

member.name: M:HwHash.HwHash.GetOrderedList
member.summary: Returns sensors ordered by display index.

member.name: M:HwHash.HwHash.GetOrderedListMini
member.summary: Returns minified sensors ordered by display index.

member.name: M:HwHash.HwHash.GetRelevantList
member.summary: Returns only relevant sensors.

member.name: P:HwHash.Models.LaunchOptions.DelayMs
member.summary:
Sets the delay in milliseconds between sensor readings. Can be changed at runtime.
Valid range is 20 to 60000 ms.

member.name: P:HwHash.Models.LaunchOptions.HighPriority
member.summary: Unused, reserved for future use.

member.name: P:HwHash.Models.LaunchOptions.HighPrecision
member.summary: Sets the TimeBeginPeriod and TimeEndPeriod to 1 ms for higher precision readings.

member.name: M:HwHash.PrecompiledRegexes.HwinfoProcess
member.remarks:
Pattern:
hwinfo(?:32|64)?
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [Hh].
○ Match a character in the set [Ww].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match a character in the set [Ff].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions, atomically.
○ Match the string "32".
○ Match the string "64".

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.HwinfoProcess_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the HwinfoProcess method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.HwinfoProcess_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.HwinfoProcess_0.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.HwinfoProcess_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.HwinfoProcess_0.RunnerFactory.CreateInstance
member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.HwinfoProcess_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.HwinfoProcess_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.HwinfoProcess_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.HwinfoProcess_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_defaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPush(System.Int32[]@,System.Int32@,System.Int32)
member.summary: Pushes 1 value onto the backtracking stack.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_indexOfString_hwinfo_OrdinalIgnoreCase
member.summary: Supports searching for the string "hwinfo".
